title: default steve
description: changes all default skins to steve
body:
**it does what it says!**
![ari, alex, efe, kai, makena, noor, steve, sunny and zuri texture files all with the steve skin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fa0fd1157f234f7f02e4f9e2705331a2e8c593c.png)

playing on a server with online mode off (not recommended) and u don't like these default skins? well, **PROBLEM FIXED!!**
or if your in the demo, and you don't like these default skins aswell, **PROBLEM FIXED!**
